name: Lemon Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy saucepan over low heat.
2. Gradually add the flour, whisking constantly until no lumps remain.
3. Slowly whisk in the milk, continuing to whisk constantly until thickened and bubbly.
4. Whisk in the salt and pepper.
5. Gradually add a portion of the hot mixture to the egg yolks, whisking constantly.
6. Return the mixture to the saucepan and stir in the remaining ingredients (cheese and lemon juice).
7. Cook over low heat for 2 minutes, stirring frequently.
